title: Update module github.com/containers/buildah to v1.41.1
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/buildah (github.com/containers/buildah)</summary>

### [`v1.41.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.41.1)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.41.1 -->

#### What's Changed

##### Notable changes

- \[release-1.41] Restore the default meaning of `--pull` (should be `always`). by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6305](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6305)
- \[release-1.41] Exclude pulled up parent directories at commit-time by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6306](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6306)
- \[release-1.41] Only suppress "noted" items when not squashing by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6319](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6319)
- \[release-1.41] History should note unset-label, timestamp, and rewrite-timestamp by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6321](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6321)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.41.0...v1.41.1

</details>
